name: In Boise, workers comp hearing loss worth much?

mainEntity.name: In Boise, workers comp hearing loss worth much?

acceptedAnswer.description: Varies by impairment; Idaho covers medical/PPI like aids, no TTD if working.[4] Context: Prove over age for award.[4] Key factors: % loss rating.[4] Practical guidance: Audiogram first, file with Industrial Commission; attorney values.[4][7] Case-specific.
